name: Beijing Hualian Department Store Co., Ltd
summary: Beijing Hualian Department Store Co., Ltd engages in the operation and management of shopping malls. It also operates and manages theater, supermarkets, department stores, and international cooperation/brand franchises. It operates approximately 40 shopping malls in China. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 15 cinemas and 115 screens. It also provides commercial factoring services, such as trade financing, accounts receivable management, and factoring consulting; leasing and property management services; and film projection services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.
